message.content:
### **Screen 1: Payment Method Selection (پرداخت قبض)**  
**Overall Layout**: Dark theme (black background) with a top navigation bar, two tabs, a main content area, and a bottom action button.  

#### **Top Navigation Bar**  
- **Left**: Status icons (battery: 90%, Wi-Fi, cellular signal, time: 11:09).  
- **Center**: Title "پرداخت قبض" (Bill Payment) in white text.  
- **Right**: Arrow icon (chevron-right) in white, indicating a back/next action.  

#### **Tab Bar**  
- Two tabs below the title:  
  - **Left Tab**: "قبض من" (My Bill) – gray text, underlined in gray (inactive).  
  - **Right Tab**: "پرداخت قبض" (Bill Payment) – orange text, underlined in orange (active).  

#### **Main Content Area**  
- **Header Text**: "برای پرداخت قبض، اطلاعات زیر را وارد کنید" (To pay the bill, enter the information below) – white text, centered.  
- **Two Radio Buttons**:  
  - **Left Button**: "دریافت" (Receive) – teal border, teal text, rounded rectangle (selected).  
  - **Right Button**: "دریافت قبض" (Receive Bill) – black background, white text, rounded rectangle (unselected).  
- **Card Section**:  
  - **Card Background**: Dark gray (semi-transparent).  
  - **Top Label**: "شماره قبض" (Bill Number) – white text, small font.  
  - **Value**: "9999190799" – white text, large font.  
  - **Left Badge**: "دریافت قبض" (Receive Bill) – teal background, white text, rounded rectangle (small).  

#### **Bottom Action Button**  
- **Button**: "ادامه" (Continue) – bright orange background, white text, rounded rectangle, full width.  


### **Screen 2: Payment Confirmation (تایید پرداخت)**  
**Overall Layout**: Identical to Screen 1, with minor text changes.  

#### **Top Navigation Bar**  
- **Center**: Title "تایید پرداخت" (Confirm Payment) – white text.  
- **Right**: Arrow icon (chevron-right) – white.  

#### **Main Content Area**  
- **Header Text**: "برای پرداخت قبض، اطلاعات زیر را وارد کنید" (To pay the bill, enter the information below) – white text, centered.  
- **Two Radio Buttons**:  
  - **Left Button**: "دریافت" (Receive) – teal border, teal text (selected).  
  - **Right Button**: "دریافت قبض" (Receive Bill) – black background, white text (unselected).  
- **Card Section**:  
  - **Top Label**: "شماره قبض" (Bill Number) – white text.  
  - **Value**: "9999190799" – white text.  
  - **Left Badge**: "دریافت قبض" (Receive Bill) – teal background, white text.  

#### **Bottom Action Button**  
- **Button**: "ادامه" (Continue) – bright orange background, white text, full width.  


### **Screen 3: Add Bill (افزودن قبض)**  
**Overall Layout**: Dark theme with a top navigation bar, an illustration, descriptive text, and a bottom action button.  

#### **Top Navigation Bar**  
- **Center**: Title "افزودن قبض" (Add Bill) – white text.  
- **Right**: Arrow icon (chevron-right) – white.  

#### **Main Content Area**  
- **Illustration**: Two overlapping cards (gray background) with icons:  
  - **Left Card**: Lightning bolt (electricity) – red icon.  
  - **Right Card**: Water drop (water) – blue icon.  
  - **Text Lines**: White lines (representing bill details) on both cards.  
- **Header Text**: "برای پرداخت قبض، اطلاعات زیر را وارد کنید" (To pay the bill, enter the information below) – white text, centered.  
- **Descriptive Paragraph**:  
  - "شما می‌توانید قبض‌های آب، برق، گاز، تلفن ثابت و اینترنت را با وارد کردن شماره قبض و انتخاب نوع قبض، به راحتی پرداخت کنید. برای شارژ تلفن همراه و خرید بسته اینترنت، به بخش شارژ و بسته‌های اینترنت مراجعه کنید." (You can easily pay water, electricity, gas, landline, and internet bills by entering the bill number and selecting the bill type. For mobile recharge and internet package purchase, refer to the recharge and internet packages section.) – white text, centered, small font.  
- **Bottom Action Button**:  
  - **Button**: "افزودن قبض +" (Add Bill +) – teal background, white text, rounded rectangle, full width.  


### **Key UI Elements Summary**  
- **Colors**: Dark theme (black background), teal (accent for selected buttons/badges), orange (active tab/action button), white (text).  
- **Buttons**: Rounded rectangles with clear labels (e.g., "ادامه", "افزودن قبض +").  
- **Icons**: Minimalist (lightning bolt, water drop) for bill types.  
- **Text**: Persian, right-to-left layout, clear hierarchy (headers in larger font).  
- **Interactive Elements**: Radio buttons, navigation arrows, action buttons.  

### **Bill Types & Operators (Implied)**  
- **Bill Types**: آب (water), برق (electricity), گاز (gas), تلفن ثابت (landline) – mentioned in Screen 3.  
- **Mobile Operators**: Not explicitly listed, but Screen 3 references "شارژ تلفن همراه" (mobile recharge) and "بسته‌های اینترنت" (internet packages).  
- **Recharge Amounts/Internet Packages**: Not visible in the screenshots.  

This analysis covers all visible UI elements, layout, and text, with precision to each screen’s design and functionality.
